name: Brakkin Ironeye
flavour: A one-eyed dwarf blacksmith who traded the forge for the hunt, his rune-etched warhammer humming whenever the dead walk near.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.text: Brakkin has advantage on saving throws against poison.

traits.name: Monster Hunter's Lore
traits.text: Brakkin has advantage on Intelligence and Wisdom checks made to recall information about aberrations, fiends, and undead, and to identify their weaknesses.

traits.name: Tough as Old Boots
traits.text: When Brakkin is reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, he can drop to 1 hit point instead. He can use this trait once and regains its use after a long rest.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.text: Brakkin makes two attacks with his rune-etched warhammer.

actions.name: Rune-Etched Warhammer
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, or 11 (1d10 + 3) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands. If the target is undead, it takes an extra 7 (2d6) radiant damage and must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be unable to take reactions until the start of Brakkin's next turn.

actions.name: Throwing Hammer
actions.text: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Hunter's Mark (1/Day)
actions.text: Brakkin marks one creature he can see within 90 feet. Once per turn, his first hit against that creature deals an extra 3 (1d6) damage. The mark lasts for 1 hour or until the target drops to 0 hit points.

reactions.name: Forgewarden's Guard
reactions.text: When a creature Brakkin can see within 5 feet of him hits an ally with an attack, Brakkin imposes disadvantage on that attack roll.

dump: A grizzled, one-eyed dwarf blacksmith turned monster-hunter with a rune-etched warhammer that hums near the undead; gruff but secretly kind, fond of ale, walking with an old limp.

art.appearance: Stocky weathered dwarf with a thick iron-grey braided beard, a milky scarred socket where one eye should be, and broad calloused blacksmith's hands
art.outfit: Soot-stained leather apron over dented chain mail, a tankard hooked to his belt, a brace of throwing hammers across his chest
art.pose: Leaning on his glowing rune-etched warhammer, weight off one stiff leg, scanning the dark with his good eye
art.environment: A dim forge-lit smithy at the edge of a haunted moor, anvil cold and hammer ready
art.personality: Gruff and blunt, hiding a warm protective heart beneath the grumbling and ale
art.style: Gritty painterly dark fantasy, warm forge light against cold shadow
